case_title: HAGAI THOMAS ATTIAS VS. PUNCH LINE SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM ISSUED TO PUNCH LINE SAN FRANCISCO
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $40) SERVED DEC-22-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PUNCH LINE SAN FRANCISCO

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-03-2023 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO APR-17-2023 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF HAGAI THOMAS ATTIAS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT PUNCH LINE SAN FRANCISCO IS PRESENT VIA UNAUTHORIZED ZOOM, REPRESENTED BY MARCUS GLASS (MANAGER). COURT FINDS DEFENDANT'S SC-109 AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR RECEIVED BY COURTROOM CLERK BY EMAIL IS INVALID AS SECTION 2 IS INCOMPLETE (DOESN'T SHOW WHO MR. GLASS IS APPEARING FOR). COURT DEEMED PROOF OF SERVICE OF CLAIM FILED ON DEC-28 AND DEC-29, 2022 TO PUNCH LINE SAN FRANCISCO ARE INVALID. COURT FINDS PUNCH LINE SAN FRANCISCO IS NOT REGISTERED UNDER DBA. PLAINTIFF HAGAI THOMAS ATTIAS ORALLY STATED WILL NOT STIPULATE TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM. CONTINUED THE MATTER TO APRIL 17, 2023 AT 8:30 A.M. IN DEPT. 506 FOR PLAINTIFF TO PROPER SERVE CLAIM TO LIVE NATION ENTERTAINMENT, INC. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGEPROTEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF THIS IS A DISMISSAL OF DEFENDANT - PUNCH LINE SAN FRANCISCO **ONLY** FILED BY PLAINTIFF ATTIAS, HAGAI THOMAS AS TO DEFENDANT PUNCH LINE SAN FRANCISCO
SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM ISSUED TO LIVE NATION ENTERTAINMENT [HEARING: APRIL-17-2023 AT 8:30AM]
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) MARCUS GLASS, GENERAL MANAGER. FILED BY DEFENDANT PUNCH LINE SAN FRANCISCO
DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF, AMENDING CLAIM TO ADD ANOTHER DEFENDANT, LIVE NATION ENTERTAINMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ATTIAS, HAGAI THOMAS
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT LIVE NATION ENTERTAINMENT
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY ATTIAS, HAGAI THOMAS AS TO DEFENDANT PUNCH LINE SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-03-2023 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00); REMARKS: DOCUMENTS WERE SERVED TO MARCUS GLASS - MANAGER) SERVED DEC-22-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PUNCH LINE SAN FRANCISCO

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-17-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-17-2023 BY CHRISTOPHER C. HITE. PLAINTIFF IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT PUNCHLINE IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT LIVE NATION ENTERTAINMENT IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY MARCU GLASS. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTOPHER HITE; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 [AMENDING TO ADD ANOTHER DEFENDANT - LIVE NATION ENTERTAINMENT] FILED BY ATTIAS, HAGAI THOMAS AS TO DEFENDANT PUNCH LINE SAN FRANCISCO LIVE NATION ENTERTAINMENT
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $75. SERVED MAR-13-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LIVE NATION ENTERTAINMENT
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-17-2023 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ATTIAS, HAGAI THOMAS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LIVE NATION ENTERTAINMENT $27.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $27.00, COST OF THE TICKET OF THE SHOW $27. COURT FINDS NO FAULT ON PART OF DEFENDANT BEYOND REFUND. COURT DENIES COSTS OF LITIGATION. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
